name: jwt-validator
description: Validates a JSON Web Token (JWT) signature and required claims using a secret key fetched from the vault. Set SECRET_NAME config key to the vault path where your JWT signing key is stored (canonical path: 'auth/jwt_secret').
setup_instructions: 1. Store your JWT signing key: create_secret {name: 'auth/jwt_secret', value: 'your-hmac-key', namespace: 'auth'}
2. Install this module with the vault path: install_module_from_catalog {name: 'jwt-validator', allowed_secrets: ['auth/jwt_secret']}
3. In node config, set SECRET_NAME = 'auth/jwt_secret' (must match the vault path exactly)
Note: If your key is stored at a different vault path (e.g. 'api/signing_key'), pass that path in allowed_secrets at install time and use the same path in SECRET_NAME config.

SECRET_NAME.description: Vault path for the JWT HMAC signing key. Canonical path: 'auth/jwt_secret'. Must exactly match the path used when the secret was stored and when the module was installed with allowed_secrets.

ALGORITHM.description: JWT signing algorithm (currently only HS256 supported)

REQUIRED_CLAIMS.description: Comma-separated claim names that must be present (e.g., 'sub,exp,iat')

TOKEN_FIELD.description: Field in the input JSON that contains the JWT string
